title: Cosmos Remix — Galaxy you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable particle spiral galaxy: particles are distributed on 2–5 logarithmic spiral arms (arm = base angle + b·ln r, radius ∝ √i) sweeping around a denser bright core; the whole disk rotates one turn per loop and the arms shimmer. A live glass panel retunes palette / shape / density / spread / speed / dot size plus an Arms knob, and reskins to any brand colour in one click. Self-contained, zero dependencies; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and use the panel (top-right) to retune live — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot, set Arms (2–5) to add or remove spiral arms, ↻ Seed to shuffle, ⧉ Copy to copy your config. KEY TECHNIQUES: a logarithmic spiral galaxy — each particle rides one of N arms at angle = arm + b·ln(r) with radius ∝ √i (even areal density), an exp(-f) core bias for a dense bright hub, per-arm shimmer, and a one-turn-per-loop disk rotation so frame(0)===frame(LOOP); colour comes from ramp(pal.cols,t) (warm hub → cool rim) drawn additively (globalCompositeOperation 'lighter'); PARAMS convention = window.__params describes knobs and window.setParam(key,value) applies them so a generic remix harness can auto-build panels; theme tokens = a PALETTES map driving both a CSS accent var and the dot ramp; SHAPES + drawShape render the chosen particle glyph cheaply. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: add palettes to PALETTES, extend __params, raise Density/Dot if too dark.
